sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99886" key="suneispoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεισ-ποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n99886.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">admit to a share in</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χάρισι, φιλίαις</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.482e</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">484d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
